---
title: "Analise_3"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr) # manipulation / tables
library(stringr) # text handling
library(readr)  # read/write CSV
library(tidyr)  #  pivot/reshaping
library(purrr)  # maps, lists
library(ggplot2) # graphs
library(tibble) # tables handling

# ==============
# AJUSTE AS PASTAS
# ==============

dir_tables <- "C:/PRISMA/Tabelas"
dir_asd    <- "C:/PRISMA/Tabelas/Reflectancia"
out_dir <- file.path(dir_tables, "outputs_csv")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dir_tables
dir_asd
out_dir
```

## Chunck 1

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load PRISMA long table + define img_solo
# ------------------------------------------------------------

img <- readr::read_csv(
  file.path(dir_tables, "PRISMA_image_profiles_BOA_ITA_IPX_long_filtered.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

img_solo <- img |>
  dplyr::filter(TIPO == "SOLO")

# checagem rápida
stopifnot(all(c("PONTO","wl_nm") %in% names(img_solo)))

names(img)

```

## Chunck 2

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# B) DEFINE img_solo / img_water (robusto)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
img <- img |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    TIPO = trimws(TIPO),
    sample_key = gsub("_", "", PONTO),
    wl_key = round(wl_nm, 3)
  )

img_solo <- img |>
  dplyr::filter(TIPO == "SOLO") |>
  dplyr::filter(is.finite(refl_img))

img_water <- img |>
  dplyr::filter(TIPO == "AGUA") |>
  dplyr::filter(is.finite(refl_img))

# checagens
img_solo |> dplyr::count(SITE)
img_water |> dplyr::count(SITE)

```

## Chunck 3

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# C) METRICS HELPERS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  if (sum(ok) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  suppressWarnings(stats::cor(x[ok], y[ok], method = "pearson"))
}

rmse <- function(x, y) {
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  if (sum(ok) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  sqrt(mean((x[ok] - y[ok])^2))
}

sam_deg <- function(x, y) {
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  if (sum(ok) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  x <- x[ok]; y <- y[ok]
  num <- sum(x*y)
  den <- sqrt(sum(x^2)) * sqrt(sum(y^2))
  if (!is.finite(num/den) || den == 0) return(NA_real_)
  acos(pmin(pmax(num/den, -1), 1)) * 180/pi
}

```

## Chunck 3C

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# C4) FieldSpec (*.asd.txt) -> fs_long -> mean spectrum -> fs_resampled
# (NORMALIZA sample_key para casar com PRISMA)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

asd_files <- list.files(dir_asd, pattern = "\\.asd\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)

read_asd_txt <- function(f) {
  lines <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)

  is_numline <- function(x) {
    nums <- str_extract_all(x, "[-+]?[0-9]*\\.?[0-9]+(?:[eE][-+]?[0-9]+)?")[[1]]
    length(nums) >= 2
  }

  i0 <- which(vapply(lines, is_numline, logical(1)))[1]
  if (is.na(i0)) stop("Não encontrei bloco numérico no arquivo: ", basename(f))

  dat <- read.table(text = lines[i0:length(lines)], header = FALSE)
  dat <- dat[, 1:2]
  colnames(dat) <- c("wl_nm", "refl_raw")

  fname <- basename(f)
  base  <- str_replace(fname, "\\.asd\\.txt$", "")  # BA_00100007

  # extrai BA_001 / PX_002 / TA_001
  ponto_short <- str_extract(base, "^[A-Z]{2}_[0-9]{3}")
  if (is.na(ponto_short)) return(NULL)  # evita NA no sample_key

  # mapeia prefixos para seus sites
  ponto_short <- ponto_short |>
    str_replace("^PX_", "IPX_") |>
    str_replace("^TA_", "ITA_")

  # NORMALIZA removendo underscore -> BA001 / ITA001 / IPX003
  sample_key <- gsub("_", "", ponto_short)

  tibble(
    sample_key = sample_key,
    wl_nm      = as.numeric(dat$wl_nm),
    refl_raw   = as.numeric(dat$refl_raw)
  )
}

fs_long <- map_dfr(asd_files, read_asd_txt)

# média das replicatas por ponto
fs_mean <- fs_long %>%
  group_by(sample_key, wl_nm) %>%
  summarise(refl_mean = mean(refl_raw, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# bandas PRISMA (alvo)
prisma_bands <- img_solo %>%
  distinct(wl_nm) %>%
  arrange(wl_nm) %>%
  pull(wl_nm)

# resample (interp linear)
fs_resampled <- fs_mean %>%
  group_by(sample_key) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    x <- .x$wl_nm
    y <- .x$refl_mean

    ord <- order(x)
    x <- x[ord]; y <- y[ord]
    keep <- !duplicated(x)
    x <- x[keep]; y <- y[keep]

    y_out <- approx(x = x, y = y, xout = prisma_bands, rule = 2)$y

    tibble(wl_nm = prisma_bands, refl_fs = y_out)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(wl_key = round(wl_nm, 3))

# checagem FINAL: agora deve bater
setdiff(unique(img_solo$sample_key), unique(fs_resampled$sample_key))
setdiff(unique(fs_resampled$sample_key), unique(img_solo$sample_key))

```

## Chunck 4

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# D) STANDARDIZE fs_resampled FOR JOIN
# ------------------------------------------------------------
if (!exists("fs_resampled")) {
  stop("fs_resampled não existe. Rode antes o chunk que gera o FieldSpec resampled.")
}

# acha automaticamente a coluna de reflectância do FieldSpec
cand <- c("refl_fs","ref1_fs","reflectance","refl","r")
col_fs <- cand[cand %in% names(fs_resampled)][1]

if (is.na(col_fs)) {
  stop("Não encontrei a coluna de reflectância em fs_resampled. Rode: names(fs_resampled)")
}

# cria colunas padrão
fs_resampled <- fs_resampled |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    refl_fs = .data[[col_fs]],
    wl_key  = round(wl_nm, 3)
  )

# garantir sample_key
if (!("sample_key" %in% names(fs_resampled))) {
  if ("PONTO" %in% names(fs_resampled)) {
    fs_resampled <- fs_resampled |> mutate(sample_key = PONTO)
  } else if ("ponto" %in% names(fs_resampled)) {
    fs_resampled <- fs_resampled |> mutate(sample_key = ponto)
  } else {
    stop("fs_resampled não tem sample_key nem PONTO. Veja names(fs_resampled).")
  }
}

stopifnot(all(c("sample_key","wl_key","wl_nm","refl_fs") %in% names(fs_resampled)))

```

## Chunck 5

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# E) RESULT TABLE — Table I (SOIL)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

res_solo <- img_solo |>
  dplyr::inner_join(fs_resampled, by = c("sample_key", "wl_key")) |>
  dplyr::group_by(SITE, PONTO, sample_key) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_wl    = sum(is.finite(refl_img) & is.finite(refl_fs)),
    SAM_deg = sam_deg(refl_img, refl_fs),
    RMSE    = rmse(refl_img, refl_fs),
    CORR    = safe_cor(refl_img, refl_fs),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(SITE, SAM_deg)

readr::write_csv(res_solo, file.path(out_dir, "TableI_SOLO_SAM_RMSE_CORR.csv"))
res_solo

```

## Chunck 6

```{r}
- ------------------------------------------------------------
# REBUILD img_solo CLEANLY (ALL SITES) + PLOTS BY SITE
# ------------------------------------------------------------

oil spectra comparison: PRISMA vs FieldSpec (resampled

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1) reconstruir img_solo SEM filtrar bbl
img_solo <- img |>
  mutate(
    TIPO = trimws(TIPO),
    sample_key = gsub("_", "", PONTO),
    wl_key = round(wl_nm, 3)
  ) |>
  filter(TIPO == "SOLO") |>
  filter(is.finite(refl_img))

# checagem: agora tem os 3 municípios
img_solo |> count(SITE)

# 2) join SOLO PRISMA x FieldSpec (resampled)
solo_join <- img_solo |>
  inner_join(fs_resampled, by = c("sample_key", "wl_key")) |>
  mutate(wl_nm = wl_nm.x)

solo_join |> count(SITE)

# 3) gerar 1 gráfico por município (SITE)
for (s in unique(solo_join$SITE)) {

  df_site <- solo_join |>
    filter(SITE == s) |>
    select(SITE, PONTO, wl_nm, refl_img, refl_fs) |>
    pivot_longer(cols = c(refl_img, refl_fs),
                 names_to = "source",
                 values_to = "refl") |>
    mutate(source = recode(source,
                           refl_img = "PRISMA",
                           refl_fs  = "FieldSpec (resampled)"))

  if (nrow(df_site) == 0) next

  p <- ggplot(df_site, aes(wl_nm, refl, linetype = source)) +
    geom_line() +
    facet_wrap(~PONTO, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste0("Soil spectra comparison: PRISMA vs FieldSpec (resampled)", s),
         x = "Wavelength (nm)",
         y = "Reflectance",
         linetype = "Source")

  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0("Fig_SOLO_", s, ".png")),
         p, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 220)

  print(p)
}
```
